name: Cocky Lexus (I'm back yall)
description:
GUESS WHOSE BACK!!.. I'm not slim shady but im back :D

Since I'm back I'm making a sp3cial car, I'm making a Lexus Lfa becauss my mom loves Lexus and their LFA so why not do one!! Im not gunna tell her though... don't wanna end up with a slipper to the face. And for the record I fell down teh garage step. It hurt :(

I spent way too long thinking of a scenario of this, I need sleep 🙏😭

Shoutout to these people who left comments under my bots:

@>KANKURO!<

@Curtimus prime.

Thanks for being here, it means alot to me. :D

--[I'd recommend a car persona, since I make car bots for car persona's.. uh yeah]--
